candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferred over duplicate total because rules prefer the primary reported revenue line.
Duplicate revenue total with identical values; useful as lower-priority fallback if label changes over time.
Not revenue; balance sheet liability.

variables.notes: Both labels represent the same top line; ordered as priority list, not to be summed.

candidates.row_label: Cost of sales, including write-down of inventories, net
candidates.why: Clear direct cost-of-sales line with populated values; best semantic match for COGS.
Exact concept but appears unpopulated in preview; lower-priority than the explicit populated cost-of-sales line.
Inventory component, not income statement expense.

variables.notes: CR:c|high|missing. Priority list captures likely label variation over time; later code should take first non-missing value, not sum.

candidates.why: Explicit overhead bucket and populated; per hierarchy, select only this row when explicit overhead row exists and is populated.
Valid overhead component, but should not be added when a populated broader operating-expenses row is selected under rule (a).
There are narrow rows with this label, but rule (a) prefers the single explicit broader operating-expenses row.
Dedicated R&D line exists, but likely supplemental and may already be embedded in Operating Expenses; avoid double counting in XSGA unless clearly separate.

variables.notes: CR:c|high|misclassified. Selected only the populated explicit overhead bucket per XSGA hierarchy rule (a). Excluded component rows and totals to avoid double counting. Did not add separate R&D because the dedicated R&D line appears supplemental and is likely included within Operating Expenses.

candidates.why: Only populated dedicated R&D expense label; best available R&D measure.
Semantically correct but unpopulated in preview.

variables.notes: Mapped to dedicated R&D labels as a priority list. Not also added to XSGA because selected XSGA row 'Operating Expenses' likely already includes R&D; subtracting XRD from XSGA should then remove it.

candidates.why: Most direct recurring interest-expense component; preferred over broad financial expenses.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost component for lease liabilities; should be included with interest expense if not already embedded, but it likely duplicates 'Amortisation of lease debt' / lease interest already within Financial expenses and may overlap with Interest expenses disclosure.
Broader finance-cost total, but should not be combined with granular interest component due to double counting; only fallback if no component existed.

variables.notes: Chose granular recurring interest line and excluded broader 'Financial expenses' to avoid double counting. Also excluded FX and fair value items per finance-cost rule.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to parent company shareholders
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, which the rules explicitly prefer.
Includes NCI, so inferior when parent-equity line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to parent company shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity line to exclude NCI and avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet NCI line; preferred label for minority interest.
Duplicate minority-interest label with identical values; useful as fallback if label changes.
Present in balance sheet but appears blank in preview; lower-priority fallback only.
Income statement allocation line, not balance-sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Priority list of balance-sheet minority-interest labels; later code should take first non-missing value, not sum.
